channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Anthropic signs billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud
item.description: US-based AI company Anthropic has signed a major deal with Google Cloud that is said to be worth tens of billions of dollars. As part of the deal, Anthropic will have access to up to one million of Google’s purpose-built Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) AI accelerators.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: CISA warns Motex Landscope Endpoint Manager has a worrying security flaw, so patch now
item.description: The critical severity bug is being actively exploited in the wild, possibly by ransomware actors, CISA says.
item.dc:creator: Sead Fadilpašić, TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft adds Copilot Mode to Edge as AI browser race heats up
item.description: Microsoft is enhancing its Edge browser with Copilot Mode to strengthen its AI capabilities, as it struggles to compete with Chrome’s dominance and a wave of emerging AI-native browsers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What CIOs can learn at TechCrunch Disrupt 2025
item.description: AI is arguably one of the most disruptive forces for enterprises since the advent of cloud computing, making it a natural focus for many of the presentations at TechCrunch Disrupt 2025. The event, in San Francisco from Oct.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Lego just announced its official Black Friday sale - here are 11 early deals I'd buy right now
item.description: Lego’s own Black Friday deals event is officially returning for 2025, and with it, you can expect major discounts on sets that only Lego sells – but in the lead-up, you can save on these 12 deals from Lego and other retailers.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Krol, TechRadar

item.title: In a California farming region, researchers are mapping rural heat to protect farmworkers
item.description: In the summers, the sky is jet black when Raul Cruz arrives at this Imperial Valley sugarcane field to start his day. He chops, cleans and bundles the crop, taking heed as the sun rises. It's hard work, but so is starting at 4 a.m.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA and JAE C. HONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OpenAI seeks to automate ‘computer use’ for Macs in the enterprise
item.description: While AI bots have begun mastering tasks in browsers and on Windows, Mac-using enterprises have largely been overlooked, until now. OpenAI aims to change that with its acquisition of generative AI interface maker Software Applications Incorporated.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OpenAI seeks to automate ‘computer use’ for Macs in the enterprise
item.description: While AI bots have begun mastering tasks in browsers and on Windows, Mac-using enterprises have largely been overlooked, until now. OpenAI aims to change that with its acquisition of generative AI interface maker Software Applications Incorporated.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The iPhone 18 Pro could come with a big Starlink upgrade – and it sounds perfect for off-grid adventures
item.description: We're starting to hear a few rumors around what Apple may have planned for the next set of flagship iPhones.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Musk's rollercoaster year: From boycotts and plunging earnings to a potential trillion-dollar payday
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — If someone left a government job with a black eye, literally, ran a company with shrinking profits, and suddenly had federal investigators crawling over their business, you might say they’re having a bad year. But most people are not Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dinosaurs were thriving in North America before the mass-extinction asteroid strike, study suggests
item.description: New research suggests that dinosaur populations were thriving in North America before the asteroid impact 66 million years ago that caused mass extinction.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bethesda celebrates Fallout Day with a host of announcements, including a Fallout 4 Anniversary Edition and Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, a native Fallout 76 release for PS5 and Xbox Series X, and more
item.description: Bethesda celebrates Fallout Day with a slew of announcements that include a Fallout 4 Anniversary Edition, Fallout 76 for current-gen consoles, and more.
item.dc:creator: Demi Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Celtic vs Sturm Graz live stream – How to watch Europa League online, FREE trial, kick-off time
item.description: Celtic take on Sturm Graz: European night sparks, Austrian counter-press chaos, and Kyogo Furuhashi magic — who will roar the loudest in the Europa League 2025?
item.dc:creator: Tom Bailey, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Nottingham Forest vs FC Porto: Europa League 2025/26 free stream, TV channels, kick-off time
item.description: We'll show you all the ways you can watch Nottingham Forest vs FC Porto as Sean Dyche looks to secure the East Midlands side the first win in the competition.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Think you can trust ChatGPT and Gemini to give you the news? Here's why you might want to think again
item.description: AI assistants routinely misrepresent news, raising concerns about misinformation and public trust in the digital age.
item.dc:creator: Eric Hal Schwartz, TechRadar

item.title: Who sets the rules for AI? It matters more than most people realize
item.description: Governing AI is "a matter of incredible economic importance of national security significance," said Kevin Frazier. The post Who sets the rules for AI? It matters more than most people realize first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition, FromSoftware's Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive version, has been delayed
item.description: FromSoftware has announced that it has delayed the Nintendo Switch 2 exclusive Elden Ring Tarnished Edition to 2026.
item.dc:creator: Demi Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Netflix shakes up Stranger Things season 5 finale release with simultaneous theater and streaming debut in world first
item.description: Netflix isn’t letting the Stranger Things season 5 finale just shout into the streaming void as it confirms the episode will also come to movie theaters.
item.dc:creator: Amelia Schwanke, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Maccabi Tel Aviv vs Midtjylland: Europa League 2025/26 live stream, TV channels, kick-off time
item.description: We'll show you all the ways to watch Maccabi Tel Aviv vs Midtjylland with the Israeli side looking to focus on what they can do on the pitch.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Extreme brings AI agent to Platform ONE for swift network diagnostics, troubleshooting
item.description: Extreme Networks has officially worked its Service AI Agent into its flagship network management package, Platform ONE, to give customers rapid access to diagnostics, autonomous troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, dashboards, and automation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 85% of developers use AI regularly – JetBrains survey
item.description: AI usage has become standard practice in software development, with 85% of developers in a recent JetBrains survey citing regular use of AI tools for coding and development. Additionally, 62% were relying on at least one AI-powered coding assistant, agent, or code editor.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reddit sues AI company Perplexity and others for 'industrial-scale' scraping of user comments
item.description: Social media platform Reddit sued the artificial intelligence company Perplexity AI and three other entities on Wednesday, alleging their involvement in an “industrial-scale, unlawful” economy to “scrape” the comments of millions of Reddit users for commercial gain.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OpenAI launches Atlas browser to compete with Google Chrome
item.description: OpenAI introduced its own web browser, Atlas, on Tuesday, putting the ChatGPT maker in direct competition with Google as more internet users rely on artificial intelligence to answer their questions.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Florida test scores rise, attendance improves after cellphone ban
item.description: A new study finds that Florida test scores rose and attendance improved after a school cellphone ban, although short-term disciplinary problems also arose in the state.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Storage constraints add to AI data center bottleneck
item.description: After GPUs, storage capacity has emerged as the next major constraint for AI data centers. Hard-drive lead times are ballooning to more than a year, and enterprise flash storage is also expected to see shortages and price increases, experts say.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scammers target retirees with election tricks and fake polling updates ahead of Nov 4 vote
item.description: Public voter records expose retirees' personal details to election scammers who create targeted cons using names, addresses, and voting history data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DCIM explained: How data center information management powers AI, capacity planning, and sustainability
item.description: Data center infrastructure management (DCIM) involves managing all aspects of the physical data center. DCIM converges IT management, operations management, facilities management, and automation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Self-propagating worm found in marketplaces for Visual Studio Code extensions
item.description: A month after a self-propagating worm was discovered in the open source NPM code repository, a similar worm has been found targeting Visual Studio Code extensions in open marketplaces.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns
item.description: The F5 breach targets a "foundational technology" relied upon by government agencies and critical infrastructure operators. The post F5 hack highlights persistent supply chain security concerns first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Senators seek to expand protections for storing child sex abuse evidence
item.description: A group of bipartisan senators introduced legislation Tuesday to provide limited liability protections for organizations to store evidence of child sexual exploitation in the cloud for law enforcement. The Safe Cloud Storage Act, put forward by Sens. Marsha Blackburn (R-Tenn.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Netflix blames tax dispute in Brazil for rare quarterly earnings letdown
item.description: Netflix missed the earnings target set by stock market analysts during the video streamer’s latest quarter, a letdown that the company blamed on a tax dispute in Brazil. The results announced Tuesday broke Netflix's six-quarter streak of posting a profit that eclipsed analysts' projections.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OpenAI launches web browser ChatGPT Atlas: How to start using it
item.description: OpenAI announced Tuesday it is launching a ChatGPT-powered web browser called Atlas that will compete directly with widely used Google Chrome.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, WGN 9

item.title: Accelerate together
item.description: Is Agentic AI Your New Cyber Wingman? The post Accelerate together — Secure by AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: AI dominates Gartner’s top strategic technology trends for 2026
item.description: To no one’s surprise, AI took center stage at the Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo going on this week in Orlando, Fla., where the research firm made its annual presentation of the core technology trends set to shape enterprise IT in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Visual Studio Code taps AI for merge conflict resolution
item.description: Visual Studio Code 1.105, the latest release of Microsoft’s popular Visual Studio Code editor, introduces several new AI coding features, including the ability to resolve merge conflicts with AI assistance, the ability to resume recent chat sessions, and the ability to install Model Context Protocol
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, Fox 5
